account:setup.name: account:setup
account:setup.description: Sets up an account to use with SuiteCloud SDK and configures the default auth ID for the SuiteCloud project. This command requires browser-based login to NetSuite.

clientid.name: clientid
clientid.description: References the OAuth2 client ID (Integration record) used for browser-based PKCE authentication. If omitted, set SUITECLOUD_CLIENT_ID env var.

dev.name: dev
dev.description: It only needs to be specified if you want to use a customized NetSuite domain.

scope.name: scope
scope.description: OAuth2 scopes requested for browser-based PKCE authentication (space-separated). For SDF handlers include restlets (example: "rest_webservices restlets").
